'''''Star Wars Insider'' 45''' is the forty-fifth issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine. It was published in [[August]] [[1999]]. Two cover variants were available for issue 45: a newsstand version featuring the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Naboo battle scene]] and a subscriber-exclusive cover featuring [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Aurra Sing/Legends|Aurra Sing]].

==Contents==
*"[[The Prequel Has Landed]]"
*:<small>[[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I]] opened to block-buster business in May, and the ''[[Insider]]'' was there (who wasn't?), with scene reports from fans across the nation, plus reactions from [[Liam Neeson]], [[Natalie Portman]], [[Samuel L. Jackson|Sam Jackson]], and other stars after their first screening!</small>
*"[[George Lucas: Lucas Takes Manhattan]]"
*:<small>The morning after unveiling [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|The Phantom Menace]] in New York City, ''Star Wars'' creator George Lucas fields questions about the future of ''Star Wars'', the "hype" surrounding [[Star Wars: Episode I The Phantom Menace|Episode I]], and even what's up with [[Qui-Gon Jinn/Legends|Qui-Gon]] not disappearing at the end of the movie, in a candid, surprising interview.</small>
*"[[Ahmed Best: Jar Jar Jams]]" {{C|by [[Scott Chernoff]]}}
*:<small>Meet the multi-talented actor/singer/dancer behind Episode I's most groundbreaking new character, and why Jar Jar may be the most human character in Episode I.</small>
*"[[Jar Jar Genesis]]"
*:<small>[[Mark Cotta Vaz]], author of the seminal ''ILM: Into the Digital Realm'', goes behind the scenes of [[Lucasfilm]] and [[Industrial Light & Magic|ILM]] to tell the remarkable story of what it took to bring Jar Jar Binks -- the most prominent and fully-realized digital character in movie history -- to life.</small>
*"New Jedi Order: An Exclusive ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime|Vector Prime]]" Excerpt"
*:<small>Exclusive! They're back -- [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]], [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]], [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewie]], and (yes) [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] return in this complete chapter from ''Vector Prime'', the first novel of The New Jedi Order. Author [[R. A. Salvatore]] reveals a new threat to the galaxy.</small>
*"[[Star Wars Celebration (article)|''Star Wars'' Celebration]]" {{C|by [[Kevin Fitzpatrick]]}}
*:<small>It was three days of non-stop ''Star Wars'', as 30,000 fans joined stars like [[Anthony Daniels]], [[Ray Park]], [[Ahmed Best]], [[Warwick Davis]], [[Hugh Quarshie]], [[Pernilla August]], and [[Rick McCallum]] for the ''Star Wars'' Celebration in Denver, Colorado. [[Kevin Fitzpatrick]] goes into the trenches to bring you the whole story, from the rain and mud to the stars and sun -- plus the [[Jar Jar Binks/Legends|Jar Jar]] jam and a few words from festival no-show [[Brian Blessed]]. The party starts here!</small>
